inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: User's body weight directly influences energy expenditure; heavier individuals burn more calories.

businessContext_i18n.en: User's body weight directly influences energy expenditure; heavier individuals burn more calories.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kullanıcının vücut ağırlığı enerji harcamasını doğrudan etkiler; daha ağır bireyler daha fazla kalori yakar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Körpergewicht des Benutzers beeinflusst direkt den Energieverbrauch; schwerere Personen verbrennen mehr Kalorien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le poids corporel influence directement la dépense énergétique ; les personnes plus lourdes brûlent plus de calories.

inputs.label: Duration
inputs.businessContext: Time spent actively snowboarding; longer duration increases total calorie burn.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time spent actively snowboarding; longer duration increases total calorie burn.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aktif snowboard yapılan süre; daha uzun süre toplam kalori yakımını artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit, die aktiv Snowboard gefahren wird; längere Dauer erhöht den Gesamtkalorienverbrauch.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps passé activement à faire du snowboard ; une durée plus longue augmente la dépense calorique totale.

inputs.label: Intensity Level
inputs.businessContext: Perceived exertion from 1 (very light, like easy cruising) to 10 (extreme, like aggressive carving or backcountry); used to derive metabolic equivalent (MET).

businessContext_i18n.en: Perceived exertion from 1 (very light, like easy cruising) to 10 (extreme, like aggressive carving or backcountry); used to derive metabolic equivalent (MET).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 (çok hafif, kolay sürüş gibi) ile 10 (aşırı, agresif karvaj veya backcountry gibi) arasında algılanan efor; metabolik eşdeğer (MET) türetmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wahrgenommene Anstrengung von 1 (sehr leicht, wie entspanntes Cruisen) bis 10 (extrem, wie aggressives Carven oder Backcountry); dient zur Ableitung des metabolischen Äquivalents (MET).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Effort perçu de 1 (très léger, comme une croisière facile) à 10 (extrême, comme du carving agressif ou du backcountry) ; utilisé pour dériver l'équivalent métabolique (MET).

inputs.label: Altitude
inputs.businessContext: Above sea level altitude of the snowboarding location; higher altitude increases metabolic rate due to reduced oxygen availability.

businessContext_i18n.en: Above sea level altitude of the snowboarding location; higher altitude increases metabolic rate due to reduced oxygen availability.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Snowboard yapılan yerin deniz seviyesinden yüksekliği; daha yüksek irtifa, azalan oksijen mevcudiyeti nedeniyle metabolizma hızını artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Höhe des Snowboardorts über dem Meeresspiegel; höhere Höhe erhöht den Stoffwechsel aufgrund reduzierter Sauerstoffverfügbarkeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Altitude au-dessus du niveau de la mer du lieu de snowboard ; une altitude plus élevée augmente le métabolisme en raison de la disponibilité réduite en oxygène.

inputs.label: Correction Factor
inputs.businessContext: Personal adjustment factor to account for individual metabolic variations (e.g., fitness level, genetics); typical range 0.8–1.2.

businessContext_i18n.en: Personal adjustment factor to account for individual metabolic variations (e.g., fitness level, genetics); typical range 0.8–1.2.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bireysel metabolik farklılıkları (örneğin, fitness seviyesi, genetik) hesaba katmak için kişisel ayar faktörü; tipik aralık 0.8–1.2.
businessContext_i18n.de: Persönlicher Anpassungsfaktor zur Berücksichtigung individueller Stoffwechselvariationen (z. B. Fitnesslevel, Genetik); typischer Bereich 0,8–1,2.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'ajustement personnel pour tenir compte des variations métaboliques individuelles (ex. niveau de forme, génétique) ; plage typique 0,8–1,2.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
